name: Mine Shaft & Rock House
about: The Mine Shaft & Rock House is a multi-entertainment venue featuring a SportsPlex with golf simulators. The facility offers a historic, industrial-themed environment with two high-end golf simulators providing realistic gameplay. It caters to a broad audience with arcade games, bowling, and a restaurant/bar. The venue operates on a walk-in and reservation basis, offering hourly rentals for groups of various sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading infrared and high-speed camera technology for realistic ball flight
No delay in ball tracking for a complete and responsive experience
Wide selection of 15 different games including golf, soccer, football, and basketball
16x10 foot screen providing an immersive visual experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service with hand-tossed pizza, steaks, burgers, Mexican, pasta, and more available at RockHouse Grille.
Bar with 12 tap handles featuring local brews and regional favorites.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end machines with industry leading technology utilizing infrared lightwave and high-speed cameras

simulator_software: PGA licensed simulator partnered with Golf Channel

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for an authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site restaurant and bar (RockHouse Grille) that serves food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but the simulators offer 15 different games with various course options.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it is a family-friendly venue with arcade games, bowling, and activities for all ages.
